No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health, well-being, or related medical/public health topics.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly enhances educational research methods and advanced skills for education students, contributing to quality tertiary education and relevant learning outcomes (Targets 4.3, 4.4).
evidence: Applying R to the Study of Educational Simulation
具備教育基礎理論與研究方法的內涵

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality, women's empowerment, or related issues.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to energy access, renewables, or efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops advanced data analysis and research skills, enhancing academic competitiveness and professional capabilities, which indirectly supports decent work and employment (Targets 8.5, 8.6).
evidence: 具備國際觀與學術競爭力 Global perspective and academic competitiveness
Acquire advanced professional knowledge and skills in the field of education

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly enhances scientific research and technological capabilities through teaching simulation research and innovative problem-solving using open-source software R (Target 9.5).
evidence: 具備執行研究與解決問題的能力

Reduced Inequalities.reason: While statistical methods can analyze inequalities, the syllabus provides no explicit or strong implicit evidence of focusing on or contributing to reducing inequalities.
evidence: 教育評量與調查資料庫的興起
多變量的統計分析的能力

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to urban development, infrastructure, or community resilience.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to sustainable consumption, production, or waste management.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or aquatic resources.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land management.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to peace, justice, governance, or institutional strength.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course builds statistical capacity for data analysis and promotes access to and use of open-source technology (R), directly supporting Targets 17.6, 17.8, and 17.19.
evidence: 教育評量與調查資料庫的興起
多變量的統計分析的能力
